column2: Verify RPAS Equipment and Independent Flight Termination System
column3: ['Identify the inspector conducting the test. ', 'Confirm that the inspector is in their role as a CAA flight-ops inspector. ', "Examine the RPAS's equipment. ", 'Verify that the RPAS is equipped with an independent flight termination system. ']
column4: ['The identified individual should be a CAA flight-ops inspector. ', 'The inspector confirms they are a CAA flight-ops inspector. ', 'All necessary equipment for the RPAS is visually inspected and accounted for. ', 'The RPAS has an independently functioning flight termination system. ']
